emergency_definition: On holidays, treat it like Sunday — after-hours with emergency coverage only
No hot water in a medical

non_emergency_routing_rules.after_hours: Collect caller information; Get name and callback number; Promise callback next business day; Promise callback by 8 AM; Do not transfer after hours

call_transfer_rules.failure_message: I apologize, I wasn't able to connect you. Let me take your information and someone will call you back shortly.

integration_constraints: Emergency calls should NOT create ServiceTrade jobs — our dispatch handles those
Never auto-create janitorial requests in ServiceTrade
special_rules: Tom Bradley: Also, important — if someone mentions a lease obligation or a penalty clause, flag it as high priority even if it's not a physical emergency
greeting: Thank you for calling Summit Facility Maintenance. This is Clara. How can I help you today?
after_hours_flow_summary:
1. Greet caller
2. Ask purpose of call
3. Determine if emergency or non-emergency
4. Emergency triggers: On holidays, treat it like Sunday — after-hours with emergency coverage only, Burst pipe, Active flooding...
5. Emergency: collect name, number, address -> transfer chain: plumbing on-call (214-555-0301) -> hvac on-call (214-555-0302) -> electrical on-call (214-555-0303) -> general dispatch (214-555-0300) -> elevator emergency (214-555-0309)
6. If transfer fails: take message, assure callback
7. Non-emergency: collect info, promise callback next business day
8. Ask 'Is there anything else I can help with?'
9. Close call
office_hours_flow_summary:
1. Greet caller
2. Ask purpose of call
3. Collect caller name and callback number
4. Transfer to: dispatch (214-555-0100) -> None (214-555-0101)
5. If transfer fails: take message, confirm follow-up
6. Ask 'Is there anything else I can help with?'
7. Close call
notes: Auto-extracted from onboarding call transcript for Summit Facility Maintenance. Emergency contact chain: 5 contact(s) configured. Services: 5 identified. Emergency triggers: 16 defined. Special handling rules: 1 captured.
